title: Law Escapes Blackbeard’s Ambush
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Prince Grus, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kuzan, Kizaru, Garp as The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.
scene: The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll never forgive you, you old fossil!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Listen up, you shot- Nosed Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you so much as blink, you'll end up in a world of pain!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Ah, Koby! You don't look too shabby!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn you, Koby! I'm so glad you weren't murdered!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Garp-San Sure is a naughty boy, running wild like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe he just called Koby 'The Future of the Marines'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't let him get ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Say whatever you want behind their backs...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you can't deny their bond is wholesome and cute!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral, Kobby-Sempai ain't safe yet! If he keeps runwin' with that shackle on, he'll wind up dead!

summary: This part advances the Winner Island and Hachinosu Fallout through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
